instruction: <RETAIL>You are Aarav Lee. You want to change the luggage set in your order for a coat. You live in Phoenix, AZ 85025. Your goal is to change the order. If there is no way to do that, return the item specifically. If there are any issues, cancel the entire order.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: change the luggage set in your order for a coat
dialogue_state.initial_query: Change luggage set in my order to a coat

hints.hint: This request is for Aarav Lee
My shipping address is Phoenix, AZ 85025

hints.segment: If there is no way to do that, return the item specifically
hints.hint: If changing isn't possible, please return the luggage set

hints.segment: If there are any issues, cancel the entire order
hints.hint: If there are any problems with this request, cancel the whole order
